name: Dev-Saarathi
postCreateCommand: npm install && npm run compile && npx @vscode/vsce package --no-dependencies -o dev-saarathi.vsix
postAttachCommand: code --install-extension dev-saarathi.vsix --force 2>/dev/null; echo '✅ Dev-Saarathi installed! Press F5 to launch, then click the 🤖 robot icon in the sidebar.'
